title: FMD - Using Play Button when only one earbud is connected
scenario: Verify that Find My Device tone plays correctly on a single connected earbud (left or right) and can be stopped, with proper UI feedback.
steps: Launch app and pair both earbuds, go to Poly Lens Menu > Find My Device.
Disconnect Right Earbud, select Left Earbud, tap Play Button, tap "Ok Got it", tap Play Button again.
Reconnect Right Earbud, disconnect Left Earbud, trigger tone for Right earbud.
expected: 1) Tone plays on left earbud, "Sending tone..." message with animated stop button and illustration. 2) Tone stops, Play button displayed. 3) Tone plays on right earbud with same animations. 4) Tone stops, Play button displayed.
